rules.rule: Check for any types and proper null handling. Verify TypeScript best practices: no unnecessary type assertions, proper generic constraints, and correct async/await usage.
Check test coverage: do tests cover boundary conditions, error cases, and edge inputs? Are test names descriptive?
Check SQL for injection risks (use parameterized queries), missing closing tags, and N+1 query patterns.
Check for proper error handling (no ignored errors), goroutine leaks, and race conditions.
Check for type hints, proper exception handling, and security issues (eval, exec, shell injection).
